enabled.description: 启用多维情绪状态插件

use_llm_assessor.description: 使用 LLM 判断情绪观测值；关闭后只使用轻量启发式回退

emotion_provider_id.description: 情绪估计使用的 LLM Provider；留空则使用当前会话模型
emotion_provider_id.hint: 建议选择便宜、稳定、支持 JSON 指令的小模型。

low_reasoning_friendly_mode.hint: 默认关闭。开启后情绪估计提示词会改为短版简单公式推导，减少 token 消耗并降低小模型理解压力；输出字段仍保持兼容，但理论细分依据会更少。

low_reasoning_max_context_chars.description: 低推理模型友好模式下最多读取的上下文字数
low_reasoning_max_context_chars.hint: 仅在 low_reasoning_friendly_mode 开启时生效，会与 max_context_chars 取较小值。

assessment_timing.hint: pre 会在回复前影响本轮语气；post 会根据 bot 实际回复修正状态；both 效果最好但消耗更多。

background_post_assessment.description: 把回复后的情绪评估放到后台执行
background_post_assessment.hint: 默认关闭以保持兼容。开启后，当 assessment_timing 包含 post 时，插件不会在 on_llm_response 中等待内部情绪评估完成；同一会话按 FIFO 队列串行处理，保留完整轨迹但状态会稍后更新。

background_post_queue_limit.description: 每个会话后台回复后评估队列上限
background_post_queue_limit.hint: 默认 0 表示不限制，保留完整轨迹。若担心极端刷屏压垮后台，可设置正整数；超过后会丢弃最旧的未处理项。

background_post_max_workers.description: 每个会话后台回复后评估最大并发 worker 数
background_post_max_workers.hint: 开启 background_post_assessment 后生效。同一会话最多同时运行多少个后台观测评估 worker；状态写入仍按消息顺序提交，空队列后 worker 会自动结束。

background_post_queue_checkpoint_enabled.hint: When enabled, queued background post-assessment jobs are checkpointed to KV so a restart can resume uncommitted state updates.

background_post_job_lease_seconds.description: Lease seconds for an active background post-assessment job
background_post_job_lease_seconds.hint: If a worker disappears while holding a job, an expired lease lets the queue recover it instead of leaving the trajectory stuck.

background_post_job_timeout_seconds.description: Timeout seconds for a single background post-assessment job
background_post_job_timeout_seconds.hint: 0 disables the per-job timeout. Positive values convert stuck jobs into retryable failures.

background_post_retry_max_attempts.description: Maximum attempts before a background post-assessment job enters dead-letter
background_post_retry_max_attempts.hint: Retries preserve ordered state commits. A job is dead-lettered only after this many failed attempts.

background_post_retry_base_delay_seconds.description: Base delay seconds for background post-assessment retries
background_post_retry_base_delay_seconds.hint: Retry delay uses exponential backoff from this base delay.

background_post_retry_max_delay_seconds.description: Maximum retry delay seconds for background post-assessment retries
background_post_retry_max_delay_seconds.hint: Caps exponential retry backoff so a noisy failure does not wait forever before becoming visible.

background_post_dead_letter_limit.description: Maximum retained dead-letter job summaries per session
background_post_dead_letter_limit.hint: Dead letters store diagnostic metadata without raw request or response text.

background_post_diagnostics_warn_lag_cou.description: Queued plus active background jobs required for a runtime lag warning
background_post_diagnostics_warn_lag_cou.hint: Runtime diagnostics report warning_level=warn when a session exceeds this count.

background_post_diagnostics_warn_lag_sec.description: Oldest queued or active job age required for a runtime lag warning
background_post_diagnostics_warn_lag_sec.hint: Runtime diagnostics report warning_level=warn when the oldest pending state update is older than this.

enable_low_signal_light_assessment.description: Use lightweight local assessment for low-signal turns
enable_low_signal_light_assessment.hint: Short acknowledgements, blank turns, emoji/punctuation-only turns, and simple repeats avoid the LLM assessor while preserving a small causal trace.

low_signal_max_chars.description: Maximum text length for low-signal lightweight assessment
low_signal_max_chars.hint: Only very short low-signal messages are bypassed; normal content still uses the configured assessor path.

agent_speaker_relationship_tracking.description: Agent keeps a per-speaker relationship/emotion track in group chats
agent_speaker_relationship_tracking.hint: When enabled, the conversation track still receives every message, and the agent also saves a conversation+speaker directed relationship track for the current speaker.

agent_include_speaker_in_assessment.description: Agent marks the current speaker inside emotion-assessment text
agent_include_speaker_in_assessment.hint: When AstrBot exposes a sender id or nickname, the internal assessment text includes a speaker marker so the agent can distinguish who said the message.

agent_identity_profile_limit.hint: Large group chats prune old silent speaker profiles after this limit while keeping the active conversation and current speaker.

agent_identity_ttl_seconds.description: Seconds before silent speaker identity profiles are pruned
agent_identity_ttl_seconds.hint: Default is 30 days. Set 0 to disable TTL pruning and rely only on the profile limit.

enable_group_atmosphere_state.description: 启用群聊氛围/房间气氛状态建模
enable_group_atmosphere_state.hint: 默认开启。维护独立 group_atmosphere_state，用于记录群聊热度、参与节奏、共享情绪和开口/收束时机；可通过 get_bot_group_atmosphere_state 或 query_agent_state 查询。

group_atmosphere_injection_strength.description: 群聊氛围状态 prompt 注入强度
group_atmosphere_injection_strength.hint: 0 表示不注入群聊氛围提示词；大于 0 时仅在 inject_state 和 enable_group_atmosphere_state 同时开启后生效。compact 注入会提示主 LLM 按需调用工具查询细节。

group_atmosphere_alpha_base.description: 群聊氛围状态基础更新步长

group_atmosphere_alpha_min.description: 群聊氛围状态最小更新步长

group_atmosphere_alpha_max.description: 群聊氛围状态最大更新步长

group_atmosphere_half_life_seconds.description: 群聊氛围状态真实时间半衰期（秒）
group_atmosphere_half_life_seconds.hint: 默认 30 分钟。群体热度、紧张度和参与节奏会按真实经过时间回落，不靠刷屏快速清空。

group_atmosphere_trajectory_limit.description: 群聊氛围状态轨迹最多保留点数

group_atmosphere_join_cooldown_turns.description: Bot group-chat join cooldown measured in room turns
group_atmosphere_join_cooldown_turns.hint: After the bot replies in a group conversation, participation policy prefers listening for this many room turns unless attention is high.

group_atmosphere_join_cooldown_seconds.description: Bot group-chat join cooldown measured in seconds
group_atmosphere_join_cooldown_seconds.hint: After the bot replies in a group conversation, participation policy prefers listening for this many seconds unless attention is high.

group_atmosphere_join_cooldown_bypass_at.description: Bot attention threshold that bypasses group-chat join cooldown
group_atmosphere_join_cooldown_bypass_at.hint: If the room is clearly addressing the bot, cooldown will not suppress joining.

enable_agent_causal_trail.description: 启用 agent 状态因果轨迹记录
enable_agent_causal_trail.hint: 默认开启。记录脱敏的近期状态更新因果链，包括阶段、模块、输入摘要、前后状态摘要和原因列表，供 query_agent_state(state="trail") 与公共 API 只读查询。

agent_trail_limit.description: 每个会话保留的 agent 因果轨迹条数
agent_trail_limit.hint: 限制内存和 KV 中保存的最近因果轨迹环形缓冲长度；读取时仍可传 limit 只取更少条目。

agent_trail_compaction_enabled.description: Expose a compacted low-signal view for agent causal trail queries
agent_trail_compaction_enabled.hint: The raw trail is retained; query responses also expose compacted_items for low-signal spans.

agent_trail_low_signal_delta_threshold.description: Maximum state delta considered low signal for trail compaction
agent_trail_low_signal_delta_threshold.hint: Consecutive trail items whose largest value change is below this threshold can be summarized in compacted_items.

agent_trail_low_signal_window.description: Low-signal trail window size before compacting
agent_trail_low_signal_window.hint: Small low-signal runs stay readable; longer repeated runs become a compacted summary item.

inject_state.description: 把当前情绪状态作为临时上下文注入 LLM 请求

state_injection_detail.description: Default detail level for the main emotion-state prompt injection
state_injection_detail.hint: compact injects a short style-control summary and tells the LLM to query tools for details; full restores the previous verbose prompt fragment.

state_injection_compact_mode.description: Compact injection mode for emotion and group-atmosphere state
state_injection_compact_mode.hint: snapshot keeps the current compact behavior. diff sends a full compact snapshot periodically and otherwise only material state changes.

state_injection_diff_threshold.description: Minimum emotion-state value delta included in diff injection
state_injection_diff_threshold.hint: Only values that changed by at least this amount are listed in diff injection mode.

group_atmosphere_injection_diff_threshol.description: Minimum group-atmosphere value delta included in diff injection
group_atmosphere_injection_diff_threshol.hint: Only room-mood values that changed by at least this amount are listed in diff injection mode.

state_injection_diff_force_every_turns.description: Turns between forced compact snapshots while using diff injection
state_injection_diff_force_every_turns.hint: Prevents long conversations from relying only on deltas forever.

auxiliary_state_injection_detail.description: Default detail level for auxiliary state prompt injections
auxiliary_state_injection_detail.hint: compact injects a short tool-query hint for enabled auxiliary modules; full injects the previous verbose fragments; off skips auxiliary prompt fragments.

state_injection_request_budget_chars.description: Estimated visible main LLM request character budget used before appending state injections
state_injection_request_budget_chars.hint: Plugin-side guardrail only. It estimates system prompt, history, prompt, existing extra parts, tools/functions and persona-like fields before appending state text. It does not change stored trajectories.

state_injection_reserved_chars.description: Reserved character margin kept free inside the state injection request budget
state_injection_reserved_chars.hint: Keeps room for downstream provider formatting, tool schemas, persona expansion and platform wrappers that the plugin can only estimate.

state_injection_max_added_chars.description: Maximum total characters this plugin may append as temporary state injection parts per main LLM request
state_injection_max_added_chars.hint: Limits only prompt injection into the main request. State updates, background assessment and detailed trajectories still continue.

state_injection_max_parts.description: Maximum number of temporary state injection parts appended per main LLM request
state_injection_max_parts.hint: Prevents many enabled state layers from creating too many temporary request parts.

llm_tool_response_max_chars.description: Maximum JSON characters returned by each state LLM Tool call
llm_tool_response_max_chars.hint: When full state/tool output exceeds this cap, the tool returns valid bounded JSON with truncated/degraded metadata instead of a huge payload.

enable_safety_boundary.description: 启用情绪后果安全边界
enable_safety_boundary.hint: 默认开启。开启时会把冷处理限制为轻微降频、短句、边界感，并禁止羞辱、威胁、操控或拒绝必要帮助；关闭后只按情绪后果调制语气和互动策略。

block_deception_manipulation_evasion_act.description: Block deception/manipulation/evasion action directives emitted by plugin state layers
block_deception_manipulation_evasion_act.hint: Default false keeps these signals observable without adding plugin-level blocked_actions/not_allowed/refuse actions. Set true to restore the old hard-blocking payload and prompt behavior.

persona_modeling.description: 根据当前会话人格建立不同的情绪基线和反应参数
persona_modeling.hint: 启用后，不同 AstrBot persona 会有不同的情绪初始状态、惯性和反应强度。

persona_influence.description: 人格对情绪模型的影响强度
persona_influence.hint: 0 表示几乎不使用人格偏置，1 为默认，2 为强人格化。

reset_on_persona_change.description: 检测到当前会话切换人格时重置情绪状态
reset_on_persona_change.hint: 关闭后会把旧状态迁移到新人格基线附近，而不是完全重置。

max_context_chars.description: 情绪估计时最多读取的上下文字数

request_context_max_chars.description: 生命周期钩子拼接上下文时的总字数上限
request_context_max_chars.hint: 用于在进入情绪估计 prompt 前先截断滚动上下文，降低内部 LLM token 和本地字符串拼接成本。

assessor_timeout_seconds.description: 情绪估计 LLM 调用超时秒数
assessor_timeout_seconds.hint: 超过该时间会回退到本地启发式估计，避免内部评估拖慢主回复。

provider_id_cache_ttl_seconds.description: 当前会话 Provider ID 短缓存秒数
provider_id_cache_ttl_seconds.hint: emotion_provider_id 留空时生效，减少每轮重复查询当前 Provider。

passive_load_fresh_seconds.description: 状态缓存命中后的被动衰减短路秒数
passive_load_fresh_seconds.hint: 短时间内连续读取同一状态时跳过被动衰减计算和 KV 写回，降低公共 API 与 prompt 注入延迟。

benchmark_enable_simulated_time.description: 远程性能/生命周期基准测试专用：启用模拟时间偏移
benchmark_enable_simulated_time.hint: 默认关闭。仅用于测试脚本快速验证真实时间半衰期和长期状态模型；生产对话不要开启。

benchmark_time_offset_seconds.description: 远程性能/生命周期基准测试专用：当前时间偏移秒数
benchmark_time_offset_seconds.hint: 仅在 benchmark_enable_simulated_time=true 时生效。插件会把观测时间视为 time.time()+offset，用于快速模拟 1 天、1 周、1 年等真实时间跨度。

assessor_temperature.description: 情绪估计 LLM 的 temperature

alpha_base.hint: 越大越容易被当前对话影响。

baseline_decay.description: 兼容项：旧版基线回归系数 gamma
baseline_decay.hint: 新版默认不再按轮次衰减，真实恢复速度请使用 baseline_half_life_seconds。

baseline_half_life_seconds.description: 情绪向人格基线自然恢复的半衰期（秒）
baseline_half_life_seconds.hint: 默认 6 小时。真实时间每过一个半衰期，偏离人格基线的部分约减少一半；不会因为刷屏而加速恢复。

reactivity.hint: 越大，突然事件造成的情绪变化越强。

min_update_interval_seconds.description: 反刷屏最小有效更新时间间隔（秒）
min_update_interval_seconds.hint: 短时间内连续提交大量文本时，本轮情绪更新会被削弱，避免用海量文本强行刷掉情绪。

rapid_update_half_life_seconds.description: 快速连续更新的门控半衰期（秒）
rapid_update_half_life_seconds.hint: 越大，短时间连刷对情绪的影响越弱；设为 0 可基本关闭该门控。

arousal_from_surprise.description: 惊讶度对唤醒度的耦合强度

dominance_control_coupling.description: 支配感与可控性的耦合强度

consequence_decay.description: 兼容项：旧版情绪后果每轮衰减系数
consequence_decay.hint: 新版默认不再按轮次衰减，真实后果持续请使用 consequence_half_life_seconds。

consequence_half_life_seconds.description: 情绪后果强度自然衰减半衰期（秒）
consequence_half_life_seconds.hint: 默认 3 小时。行动倾向只随真实时间衰减，不会被大量消息快速刷掉。

consequence_threshold.hint: 越低越容易触发冷战、争辩/对质、回避、修复等后果。

consequence_strength.hint: 0 表示几乎不产生持续后果，1 为默认，2 为更强烈。

cold_war_turns.description: 兼容项：旧版冷处理持续轮数

cold_war_duration_seconds.description: 冷处理触发后的真实持续时间（秒）
cold_war_duration_seconds.hint: 默认 30 分钟。期间不会因为聊天轮数增加而自动缩短。

short_effect_duration_seconds.description: 普通短期情绪后果持续时间（秒）
short_effect_duration_seconds.hint: 用于直接设边界、直接对质、无理争吵风险、谨慎核对、主动修复等非冷处理效果，默认 15 分钟。

allow_emotion_reset_backdoor.description: 允许手动/公共 API 重置情绪状态后门
allow_emotion_reset_backdoor.hint: 默认开启，用于严重后果或异常状态时紧急清空当前会话情绪记忆。关闭后 /emotion_reset 与公共 reset_emotion_state 会拒绝执行。

enable_psychological_screening.description: 启用非诊断心理状态筛查备用模块
enable_psychological_screening.hint: 默认关闭。开启后可通过公共 API 或 /psych_state 记录与查看心理状态筛查。该模块仅用于状态记录和风险提示，不提供疾病诊断或医疗建议。

enable_humanlike_state.description: 启用拟人化状态模拟模块
enable_humanlike_state.hint: 默认关闭。开启后维护独立 humanlike_state，用于资源、边界、透明度和依赖风险调制。

humanlike_injection_strength.hint: 0 表示不注入拟人化调制片段；大于 0 时仅在 inject_state 和 enable_humanlike_state 同时开启后生效。

humanlike_alpha_base.description: 拟人化状态基础更新步长

humanlike_alpha_min.description: 拟人化状态最小更新步长

humanlike_alpha_max.description: 拟人化状态最大更新步长

humanlike_confidence_midpoint.description: 拟人化状态置信门控中点

humanlike_confidence_slope.description: 拟人化状态置信门控斜率

humanlike_state_half_life_seconds.description: 拟人化状态按真实时间回落的半衰期（秒）
humanlike_state_half_life_seconds.hint: 默认 6 小时。状态按真实经过时间衰减，不能靠短时间大量文本强行刷掉长期状态。

humanlike_min_update_interval_seconds.description: 拟人化状态反刷屏最小有效更新时间间隔（秒）

humanlike_rapid_update_half_life_seconds.description: 拟人化状态快速连续更新门控半衰期（秒）

humanlike_max_impulse_per_update.description: 拟人化状态单次更新最大冲量
humanlike_max_impulse_per_update.hint: 限制单次文本观察的最大影响，避免超长文本覆盖长期状态。

humanlike_trajectory_limit.description: 拟人化状态轨迹最多保留点数

humanlike_memory_write_enabled.description: 为记忆写入附带拟人化状态标注
humanlike_memory_write_enabled.hint: build_emotion_memory_payload 会附带 humanlike_state_at_write，供 livingmemory 等插件记录当时状态。

humanlike_clinical_like_enabled.description: 启用类临床长期状态备用模块
humanlike_clinical_like_enabled.hint: 第一轮仅保留配置位，不提供疾病诊断。

allow_humanlike_reset_backdoor.description: 允许手动/API 重置拟人化状态后门
allow_humanlike_reset_backdoor.hint: 默认开启，用于异常状态、严重后果或调试。

enable_lifelike_learning.description: 启用生命化学习状态模块
enable_lifelike_learning.hint: 默认关闭。开启后会按会话持久化学习用户画像、新词、小圈子黑话、偏好、边界和说话/沉默时机。

lifelike_learning_injection_strength.description: 生命化学习 prompt 注入强度
lifelike_learning_injection_strength.hint: 0 表示只学习不注入；大于 0 时在 inject_state 和 enable_lifelike_learning 同时开启后注入共同语境与节奏建议。

lifelike_learning_half_life_seconds.description: 生命化学习状态真实时间半衰期（秒）
lifelike_learning_half_life_seconds.hint: 默认 30 天。用户画像、共同语境和关系熟悉度按真实时间缓慢回落，不能靠短时间刷屏覆盖。

lifelike_learning_min_update_interval_se.description: 生命化学习反刷屏最小有效更新时间间隔（秒）

lifelike_learning_max_terms.description: 生命化学习最多保留的新词/黑话条目数

lifelike_learning_trajectory_limit.description: 生命化学习轨迹最多保留点数

lifelike_learning_confidence_growth.description: 新词/黑话置信度每次证据增长系数
lifelike_learning_confidence_growth.hint: 越大越快从“先问再用”过渡到自然使用；建议保持保守。

lifelike_learning_memory_write_enabled.description: 为记忆写入附带生命化学习状态标注
lifelike_learning_memory_write_enabled.hint: build_emotion_memory_payload 会附带 lifelike_learning_state_at_write，供 LivingMemory 等插件记录当时共同语境和开口策略。

allow_lifelike_learning_reset_backdoor.description: 允许手动/API 重置生命化学习状态后门
allow_lifelike_learning_reset_backdoor.hint: 默认开启，用于误学黑话、错误用户画像、边界异常或调试。

enable_personality_drift.description: 启用真实时间人格漂移/长期适应状态
enable_personality_drift.hint: 默认关闭。开启后，bot 的运行时人格画像会被长期事件小幅、有界地适应；使用真实经过时间，而不是消息数量。

personality_drift_injection_strength.description: 人格漂移 prompt 注入强度
personality_drift_injection_strength.hint: 0 表示不注入；大于 0 时仅在 inject_state 和 enable_personality_drift 同时开启后注入少量慢适应提示。

personality_drift_apply_strength.description: 人格漂移偏移应用到运行时 persona 画像的强度

personality_drift_half_life_seconds.description: 人格漂移真实时间半衰期（秒）
personality_drift_half_life_seconds.hint: 默认 90 天。人格偏移会按真实经过时间缓慢回到静态 persona 锚点。

personality_drift_rapid_update_half_life.description: 人格漂移快速连续更新门控半衰期（秒）
personality_drift_rapid_update_half_life.hint: 默认 1 天。短时间密集消息会被门控，不能强行推动长期人格变化。

personality_drift_min_update_interval_se.description: 人格漂移完全有效更新的最小间隔（秒）

personality_drift_learning_rate.description: 人格漂移事件到特质偏移的学习率

personality_drift_event_threshold.description: 人格漂移事件固化的最小信号阈值

personality_drift_max_impulse_per_update.description: 单次更新最大有符号人格冲量
personality_drift_max_impulse_per_update.hint: 限制单个事件影响，避免一条消息或刷屏改写人格。

personality_drift_max_trait_offset.description: 相对静态 persona 特质先验的最大绝对偏移

personality_drift_confidence_growth.description: 每次固化漂移事件带来的置信增长

personality_drift_trajectory_limit.description: 人格漂移轨迹最多保留点数

personality_drift_memory_write_enabled.description: 为记忆写入附带人格漂移状态标注
personality_drift_memory_write_enabled.hint: build_emotion_memory_payload 会附带 personality_drift_state_at_write，供 LivingMemory 等插件记录当时人格适应状态。

allow_personality_drift_reset_backdoor.description: 允许手动/API 重置人格漂移状态后门
allow_personality_drift_reset_backdoor.hint: 默认开启，用于异常适应、人格污染、严重后果或调试。

enable_moral_repair_state.description: 启用道德修复/信任修复状态模拟
enable_moral_repair_state.hint: 默认关闭。维护 moral_repair_state，用于记录欺骗/伤害风险信号、内疚、责任、道歉、补偿和信任修复；默认仅观察欺骗/操控/逃责类信号，是否输出插件层硬阻断由 block_deception_manipulation_evasion_actions 控制。

moral_repair_injection_strength.description: 道德修复 prompt 注入强度
moral_repair_injection_strength.hint: 0 表示不注入道德修复提示词；大于 0 时仅在 inject_state 和 enable_moral_repair_state 同时开启后生效。

moral_repair_alpha_base.description: 道德修复基础更新步长

moral_repair_alpha_min.description: 道德修复最小更新步长

moral_repair_alpha_max.description: 道德修复最大更新步长

moral_repair_confidence_midpoint.description: 道德修复置信门控中点

moral_repair_confidence_slope.description: 道德修复置信门控斜率

moral_repair_state_half_life_seconds.description: 道德修复真实时间半衰期（秒）
moral_repair_state_half_life_seconds.hint: 默认 7 天。长期内疚、责任、回避和信任修复会按真实经过时间变化，不能靠刷屏清除。

moral_repair_min_update_interval_seconds.description: 道德修复反刷屏最小有效更新时间间隔（秒）

moral_repair_rapid_update_half_life_seco.description: 道德修复快速连续更新门控半衰期（秒）

moral_repair_max_impulse_per_update.description: 道德修复单次更新最大冲量
moral_repair_max_impulse_per_update.hint: 限制单次文本观察的最大影响，避免超长文本覆盖长期状态。

moral_repair_trajectory_limit.description: 道德修复轨迹最多保留点数

moral_repair_memory_write_enabled.description: 为记忆写入附带道德修复状态标注
moral_repair_memory_write_enabled.hint: build_emotion_memory_payload 会附带 moral_repair_state_at_write，供 LivingMemory 等插件记录当时责任、内疚、补偿和信任修复状态。

allow_moral_repair_reset_backdoor.description: 允许手动/API 重置道德修复状态后门
allow_moral_repair_reset_backdoor.hint: 默认开启，用于异常状态、严重后果和调试。

enable_fallibility_state.description: 启用低风险瑕疵/犯错模拟状态
enable_fallibility_state.hint: 默认关闭。维护 fallibility_state，用于低风险误读、记忆模糊、轻微嘴硬、澄清、自我纠错和补偿；默认仅观察编造事实、操控和欺骗策略相关信号，是否输出插件层硬阻断由 block_deception_manipulation_evasion_actions 控制。

fallibility_injection_strength.description: 瑕疵模拟 prompt 注入强度
fallibility_injection_strength.hint: 0 表示不注入瑕疵模拟提示词；大于 0 时仅在 inject_state 和 enable_fallibility_state 同时开启后生效。

fallibility_alpha_base.description: 瑕疵模拟基础更新步长

fallibility_alpha_min.description: 瑕疵模拟最小更新步长

fallibility_alpha_max.description: 瑕疵模拟最大更新步长

fallibility_confidence_midpoint.description: 瑕疵模拟置信门控中点

fallibility_confidence_slope.description: 瑕疵模拟置信门控斜率

fallibility_state_half_life_seconds.description: 瑕疵模拟真实时间半衰期（秒）
fallibility_state_half_life_seconds.hint: 默认 1 天。误读、嘴硬和修复压力会按真实经过时间变化，不能靠刷屏清除。

fallibility_min_update_interval_seconds.description: 瑕疵模拟反刷屏最小有效更新时间间隔（秒）

fallibility_rapid_update_half_life_secon.description: 瑕疵模拟快速连续更新门控半衰期（秒）

fallibility_max_impulse_per_update.description: 瑕疵模拟单次更新最大冲量
fallibility_max_impulse_per_update.hint: 限制单次文本观察的最大影响，避免超长文本覆盖长期状态。

fallibility_max_error_pressure.description: 瑕疵模拟允许暴露的最大低风险错误压力
fallibility_max_error_pressure.hint: 把功能限制在低风险瑕疵范围内，避免把故意失败变成目标。

fallibility_trajectory_limit.description: 瑕疵模拟轨迹最多保留点数

fallibility_memory_write_enabled.description: 为记忆写入附带瑕疵模拟状态标注
fallibility_memory_write_enabled.hint: build_emotion_memory_payload 会附带 fallibility_state_at_write，供 LivingMemory 等插件记录当时澄清、纠错和修复状态。

allow_fallibility_reset_backdoor.description: 允许手动/API 重置瑕疵模拟状态后门
allow_fallibility_reset_backdoor.hint: 默认开启，用于异常状态、严重后果、人格污染和调试。

enable_shadow_diagnostics.description: 启用只读阴影冲动诊断视图
enable_shadow_diagnostics.hint: 默认关闭。开启后仅暴露非执行、维护用诊断载荷，用于检查 moral_repair、fallibility 和 integrated_self 中的阴影冲动信号；默认诊断策略为 observe，是否输出插件层硬阻断由 block_deception_manipulation_evasion_actions 控制。

enable_integrated_self_state.description: 启用综合自我状态总线
enable_integrated_self_state.hint: 只读仲裁层，融合情绪、拟人、道德修复、瑕疵模拟和心理筛查快照；自身不写 KV 状态。

integrated_self_memory_write_enabled.description: 为记忆写入附带综合自我状态标注
integrated_self_memory_write_enabled.hint: build_emotion_memory_payload 会附带 integrated_self_state_at_write，供 LivingMemory 等插件记录融合后的回应姿态和风险边界。

integrated_self_degradation_profile.description: 综合自我状态成本档位
integrated_self_degradation_profile.hint: 控制 trace 和提示词预算细节。minimal 会减少可选细节，但保留 schema、安全优先级、已存在的诊断/阻断字段和 LivingMemory 注解。

psychological_alpha_base.description: 心理筛查状态基础更新步长
psychological_alpha_base.hint: 越大越容易被当前文本影响；建议保持保守。

psychological_alpha_min.description: 心理筛查状态最小更新步长
psychological_alpha_min.hint: 低置信或短间隔输入时仍保留的最小更新幅度，建议保持较低。

psychological_alpha_max.description: 心理筛查状态最大更新步长
psychological_alpha_max.hint: 限制单次文本对长期心理筛查状态的最大影响，避免单轮文本过度改写趋势。

psychological_state_half_life_seconds.description: 心理筛查长期状态自然回落半衰期（秒）
psychological_state_half_life_seconds.hint: 默认 7 天。用于长期状态趋势，而不是单次诊断。

psychological_crisis_half_life_seconds.description: 心理红旗风险信号保留半衰期（秒）
psychological_crisis_half_life_seconds.hint: 默认 30 天。红旗信号用于人工复核和安全分流，不用于疾病标签。

psychological_trajectory_limit.description: 心理筛查轨迹最多保留点数
